added.0ki7+P: I understand that disconnecting this teen will remove my access to information about their Discord activity.
added.F2lccv: This will remove {username} as your connected guardian
added.Or6hgl: Laws in their region require teens ages 13–16 to have a connected guardian. Without a connected guardian, {username} won’t be able to continue accessing Discord.
added.PGQBnk: I understand that Discord requires at least one guardian to be connected to this teen’s account for them to continue using Discord.
added.PlrZal: Disconnecting from {username} will send them a notification that you removed them. It will also revoke your access to information about their Discord activity.
added.WH+Gba: This will remove your guardian connection with this account.
added.XyRW4c: Disconnecting from {username} will send them a notification that you removed them. It will also revoke their access to information about your Discord activity.
added.eiABQz: I understand that Discord requires at least one guardian to be connected to my account for me to continue using Discord.
added.hOEHFn: Laws in your region require teens ages 13–16 to have a connected guardian. Without a connected guardian, you won’t be able to continue accessing Discord.
added.sCbKs4: I understand that disconnecting this guardian will remove their access to information about my Discord activity.

deleted./MYCee: I understand that disconnecting this teen will revoke my access to their Discord activity information.
deleted.EvMGLT: Disconnecting from your teen will send them a notification that you removed them. It will also revoke your access to their Discord activity information.
deleted.FAMILY_CENTER_DISCONNECT_LINK_MODAL_DISC: I understand that disconnecting this teen will revoke my access to their Discord activity information.
I understand that disconnecting this parent will revoke their access to my Discord activity information.
deleted.FAMILY_CENTER_DISCONNECT_LINK_MODAL_NOTI: Disconnecting from your teen will send them a notification that you removed them. It will also revoke your access to their Discord activity information.
Disconnecting from your parent will send them a notification that you removed them. It will also revoke their access to your Discord activity information.
deleted.VJaHUb: I understand that disconnecting this parent will revoke their access to my Discord activity information.
deleted.f1SUeW: Disconnecting from your parent will send them a notification that you removed them. It will also revoke their access to your Discord activity information.

deleted./MYCee: 이 자녀와 연결을 끊으면 더는 해당 자녀의 Discord 활동 정보에 액세스할 수 없음을 이해하고 있습니다.
deleted.EvMGLT: 자녀와 연결을 끊으면 자녀에게 연결이 끊겼다는 알림이 전송되며, 자녀의 Discord 활동 정보에 대한 회원님의 액세스 권한이 취소됩니다.
deleted.VJaHUb: 이 보호자와 연결을 끊으면 해당 보호자가 더는 내 Discord 활동 정보에 액세스할 수 없음을 이해하고 있습니다.
deleted.f1SUeW: 보호자와 연결을 끊으면 보호자에게 연결이 끊겼다는 알림이 전송되며, 회원님의 Discord 활동 정보에 대한 보호자의 액세스 권한이 취소됩니다.

0ki7+P.summary: These strings warn that teens ages 13-16 in some regions may need a connected guardian, and that disconnecting a guardian affects Discord access or Family Center activity visibility.
0ki7+P.what_to_do: If continued access is required, keep or set up a guardian connection before removing the current one. Before disconnecting, confirm that the notification and activity-visibility changes are intended.
